html:
Exclusive to:

“Crafted by WX-78 imbued with a dark fuel, the Auto-Grabbers will harvest and pick along with WX-78 and bring them back to them.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Gary.”

-

The Auto-Grabber is a gathering drone that can pick up or harvest nearby items. WX-78 with the Shadow Servitor skill can implant either a Nightmare Fuel or a Pure Horror to unlock it. WX-78 can craft up to 2 Auto-Grabbers when a Nightmare Fuel implanted, or up to 4 when a Pure Horror implanted. The Auto-Grabbers with Pure Horror implanted have higher speed and wider range.

Once crafted, the Auto-Grabber follows the player and automatically picks up or harvests nearby items when the player picks up items. They can follow the player through the Sinkhole.

Auto-Grabbers can also function on the Backup Chassis, automatically harvest nearby items and store them into Backup Chassis. If the Spatializer Circuit is inserted and powered, with the Warm Standby skill active, the Auto-Grabber can deposit matching items into Expansive Storage Units on the Backup Chassis.

The pickup range of an Auto-Grabber powered by Nightmare Fuel is 1.5 tiles, while one powered by Pure Horror has a range of 2.5 tiles. With the Signal Booster skill, the range is increased by 0.75 tiles. With the Beta Circuits Tinkering I skill, each plugged-in Rangebooster Circuit further increases the range by 0.25 tiles. For Rangebooster Circuits to function on the Chassis, the Warm Standby skill is also required. With all the skills and circuits, the max range of Auto-Grabber is 5-tile radius circle.

If the implanted Nightmare Fuel or Pure Horror is removed, all Auto-Grabbers immediately die and drop their crafting materials on the ground.

The Catcoons will attack Auto-Grabbers and make them disable for a few seconds.

Contents

  • 1 Harvestable Plants
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets

Harvestable Plants

Things Auto-Grabbers can harvest:

  • Sapling
  • Lunar Sapling
  • Spiky Bush
  • Grass Tuft
  • Reeds
  • Monkeytail
  • Light Flower
  • Bulbous Lightbug
  • Withered Light Flower
  • Cave Lichen
  • Berry Bush
  • Berry Bush
  • Juicy Berry Bush
  • Stone Fruit Bush
  • Banana Bush
  • Cave Banana Tree
  • Mossy Vine
  • Mysterious Plant
  • Desert Cactus
  • Oasis Cactus
  • Bull Kelp
  • Farm Plants

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Jeweled Collection
Opulent Auto-Grabber
It's not entitlement if it already belongs to you.
Woven - Distinguished
Gothic Collection
Gloomy Auto-Grabber
It goes about its gathering with grim purpose.

Trivia

  • The Auto-Grabber is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

Auto-Grabber
"It's all up for grabs."
Crafting
×1 ×1 ( only)
Filters
(for ).
Miscellaneous
"wx78_shadowdrone_harvester"
“A collector in WX's collection.”
–Wilson
“WX, you greedy old robot!”
–Willow
“Busy little guy!”
–Wolfgang
“When will it be enough?”
–Wendy
“THE WORLD IS MINE, GARY. ALL MINE”
–WX-78
“It is a rather industrious little gatherer.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yes, Lucy. It'll pick up the logs.”
–Woodie
“That robot applies forces indiscriminately to take what it wants.”
–Maxwell
“The metal warriör's little plunderer.”
–Wigfrid
“It's rude to grab!”
–Webber
“Have a happy harvest!”
–Warly
“Friend get things”
–Wormwood
“Save some for the rest of us, buddy!”
–Winona
“The hardest working collector in this sector!”
–Wortox
“Florp! So grabby!”
–Wurt
“That sure is handy! Or should I say clawy! Get it, Wobes?”
–Walter
“Of course an automaton would automate.”
–Wanda
“Crafted by WX-78 imbued with a dark fuel, the Auto-Grabbers will harvest and pick along with WX-78 and bring them back to them.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Auto-Grabber là máy bay không người lái thu thập có thể nhặt hoặc thu hoạch các vật phẩm gần đó. WX-78 với kỹ năng Shadow Servitor có thể cấy Nhiên liệu Ác mộng hoặc Kinh dị thuần túy để mở khóa nó. WX-78 có thể tạo ra tối đa 2 Auto-Grabber khi cấy Nhiên liệu Ác mộng hoặc tối đa 4 khi cấy Nhiên liệu Ác mộng. Auto-Grabbers được cấy ghép Pure Horror có tốc độ cao hơn và phạm vi rộng hơn.
